_comment: The provided linked DB for the Smart Brain. Public URL + anon key only (safe to commit — same values are served to browsers). To relink to a different DB, replace these values or set SMART_BRAIN_SUPABASE_URL / SMART_BRAIN_SUPABASE_KEY in Vercel env, which take precedence. Harden: add SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in Vercel env and tighten the allow_all RLS policies.
